column1: Cleena LLC|https://www.cleena.net/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=10-cleena-llc|New York City|Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island, and wider New York City commercial kitchens|Rafael M Garcia|services@cleena.net|917-400-8134|Cleena's official site says it provides commercial kitchen exhaust hood cleaning in New York, advertises bare-metal hood and exhaust cleaning for restaurants, says it is licensed and FDNY approved, and publishes services@cleena.net with 917-400-8134, while the current FDNY approved commercial cooking list names Cleena LLC in the Bronx with owner Rafael M Garcia.
